metadata.description: Clinical AI skills for FHIR guardrails, PHI redaction, EHR integration, personal health management, and biomedical research — from healthclaw.io and SmartHealthConnect.

plugins.name: healthclaw-guardrails
plugins.description: FHIR AI agent guardrails with 16 MCP tools including Compiled Truth (current state + evidence timeline) and Wearables (Garmin, Oura, Polar, Suunto, Whoop, Fitbit, Strava via Open Wearables). PHI redaction on every read, step-up auth for writes, immutable audit, tenant isolation, Curatr data quality, Fasten Connect EHR ingestion. FHIR R4 US Core v9 + R6 ballot3.

plugins.name: smarthealthconnect
plugins.description: Personal health management skills — preventive care gap tracking (HEDIS), medication refill monitoring, healthy habits dashboard, diet & exercise analytics, pediatric immunization schedules, and biomedical research / clinical trial monitoring.
